     the Fermi energy is     0.4980 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.31984999 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000005 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.05380672 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6197.26604327 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -122999.30596512 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   62081.20581631 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2131.51040180 Ry
